title: Early morning disco
summary: Spring morning sun coming through my blinds, across my sofa, onto my disco ball. Taken with a FujiFilm FinePix 1400 Zoom , which at 1.3 megapixels saved photos at 1280×960 pixels!
content:
Spring morning sun coming through my blinds, across my sofa, onto my disco ball.

Taken with a FujiFilm FinePix 1400 Zoom, which at 1.3 megapixels saved photos at 1280×960 pixels!
